login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Access your trips, payments and mobility tools.
login.hero: Safe rides, verified drivers and an experience designed for passengers, drivers and administrators.
login.allInOneDesc: Trips, payments and activity in one app.
login.terms: By continuing, you accept AXI's Terms of Use and Privacy Policy.
login.invalidCredentials: The email or password is incorrect.

register.title: Create your account
register.subtitle: Register as a passenger or start your application to become a driver.
register.driverDesc: Create an account and submit your application.
register.terms: I accept AXI's Terms of Use and Privacy Policy.
register.heroSubtitle: Designed to connect passengers and drivers through a modern, secure and simple platform.
register.benefit3: Payments and activity from one account
register.passwordLength: Password must be at least 6 characters.
register.acceptTerms: You must accept the terms and privacy policy.
register.alreadyRegistered: An account with this email already exists.
register.confirmEmail: Account created. Check your email to confirm your registration.

dashboard.historySoon: Your trip history will appear here
dashboard.mapDescription: Drivers, routes and active trips will appear here.
dashboard.recentDescription: View the latest activity on your account.
dashboard.noActivityDescription: Your first trip will appear here.

profile.securityDescription: Use a unique password and avoid sharing your login information with other people.
profile.editProfileDescription: Keep your contact information up to date.
profile.languageDescription: The language will apply to your entire account.
profile.emailChangeLater: Email changes will be available later.
profile.passwordDescription: Your new password must have at least 8 characters.
profile.loadingError: We could not load your profile.
profile.loadProfileError: We could not load the profile:

profile.authNameUpdateError: The profile was saved, but the authentication name could not be updated:
profile.passwordMin: The password must have at least 8 characters.
profile.passwordUpdateError: We could not change the password:

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.welcomeDescription: You will receive travel, payment and security updates here.
notifications.description: Receive important updates about rides, payments and security, even when AXI is not open.
notifications.missingVapid: The public VAPID key has not been configured.
notifications.permissionDenied: You must allow notifications before enabling them.
notifications.invalidSubscription: The browser returned an invalid subscription.
notifications.blockedDescription: Notifications are blocked in this browser. Allow them from the site settings.
notifications.unsupportedDescription: This browser or device does not support push notifications.
notifications.testError: The test notification could not be sent.
notifications.sentToDevice: The test notification was sent to your device.
notifications.notificationError: The notification could not be sent.

driverApplications.title: Driver Applications
driverApplications.subtitle: Review the driver, license, concession and legal taxi information.
driverApplications.documentsUnavailable: The documents could not be opened.
driverApplications.faceScorePrompt: Enter the estimated match percentage from 0 to 100:
driverApplications.invalidScore: Enter a valid number between 0 and 100.
driverApplications.confirmFaceReview: Do you confirm this facial review?
driverApplications.confirmApprove: Do you confirm that you reviewed the identity, license, concession and taxi documents?

driverApplication.taxiLegalDescription: Enter the vehicle information and the government authorization under which it operates.
driverApplication.concessionAuthorityRequired: Enter the authority that issued the concession or permit.
driverApplication.officialDocumentsDescription: Files must be clear, readable and show the complete document.
driverApplication.description: AXI is an exclusive platform for legally authorized taxis.
driverApplication.concessionNumberInvalid: Enter a valid concession or permit number.
driverApplication.driverLicenseDescription: Enter your current driver license information.
driverApplication.concessionHolderRequired: Enter the name of the concession holder.
driverApplication.documentsRequired: Select all required documents, including the concession or permit document.
driverApplication.submitted: Application submitted successfully. Your information and documents are pending review.
driverApplication.licenseRequired: Enter the license number and expiration date.
driverApplication.vinInvalid: The VIN or serial number must contain exactly 17 characters.
driverApplication.title: Application to drive with AXI
driverApplication.personalPhotosDescription: The selfie must clearly show the applicant's face.
driverApplication.locationRequired: Enter the state and city or municipality where the taxi operates.
driverApplication.concessionAuthorityPlaceholder: Department or authority that issued it
driverApplication.taxiPhotosDescription: These are optional and help visually validate the vehicle.
